rag_rules: Move guarantee statements to valid component type scopes or implementation scopes as needed.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex in guarantee expressions.
Use type-level guarantees over visible ports or implementation-level assigns with valid output left-hand sides.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `assign` only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation contracts.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex.
